apk_hotkey_evidence.display_behavior: typed phrase auto-generates 1-2 character preview label unless user chooses icon
apk_hotkey_evidence.runtime: ExtensionBar.HotKeys supplies HotKey(index, icon, phrase) list to HotKeyExtensionBar
apk_hotkey_evidence.storage: hotkey_prefs entries keyed by index with JSON [isFont, icon, phrase]

custom_snippet_scope: Fleksy-inspired feature is custom snippets launched via top-row buttons; do not clone full Fleksy extension/store system.
fleksy_repo_research_summary: PRD should treat the Fleksy feature as behavior to recreate on top of Unexpected Keyboard unless user can provide APK/source for exact app implementation.

app_identity.question: What should the Android app identity be for the build?
app_identity.rationale: Use app name FrankenKey and a new package id such as dev.frankenkey.keyboard, separate from Unexpected Keyboard.

snippet_insertion_behavior.question: When a user taps a custom snippet button, what should happen?
snippet_insertion_behavior.rationale: Immediately commit the snippet text into the active app text field and leave the keyboard open, matching standard custom snippet key behavior.

snippet_management.question: How should users create and manage custom snippets?
snippet_management.rationale: Use fixed indexed slots, phrase field, auto-generated preview label, optional icon-style label selection, and empty slots shown in the grid.

snippet_navigation.answer: Fleksy-style groups of 7 with horizontal left/right scrolling between groups
snippet_navigation.question: How should custom snippet buttons be organized in the top row?
snippet_navigation.rationale: Each visible page shows seven snippet buttons; users swipe/scroll left or right to reveal additional groups of seven, matching the intended Fleksy-like interaction.

snippet_row_visibility.question: When should the custom snippet top row be visible?
snippet_row_visibility.rationale: Show the snippet row above the keyboard whenever FrankenKey is open, controlled by an app setting to turn the row on or off.

snippet_storage.question: How should custom snippets be stored and handled for privacy?
snippet_storage.rationale: Store snippets only on-device; no cloud sync, accounts, analytics, or network access for snippet content.

privacy_fixes.direct_boot: DirectBootAwarePreferences removes/skips legacy SnippetStore.PREF_SLOTS during copy.
privacy_fixes.legacy_migration: SnippetStore.loadSlots(Context) migrates legacy PREF_SLOTS JSON from default SharedPreferences into the no-backup snippet file and removes PREF_SLOTS after successful migration/removal.
privacy_fixes.secure_editor_gate: Keyboard2 passes editor_config.should_show_snippet_row to SnippetRowView; SnippetRowView hides/removes pages before loading phrases when false. EditorConfig rejects password, visible-password, web-password, combined password-bit text inputs, and number-password while allowing normal no-suggestions text.
privacy_fixes.storage: SnippetSlotsPreference uses SnippetStore Context APIs; SnippetStore writes raw phrases to Context.getNoBackupFilesDir()/frankenkey_snippets.json.

P002.notes: Static layout seam test proves keyboard.xml root remains vertical and Keyboard2View remains a direct child with id @+id/keyboard_view and a direct sibling insertion position before it.

P003.notes: Covers one-based empty-slot labels, one/two Unicode code-point generated labels, custom label override, configured state, and seven-slot page slicing.

P004.notes: Dynamic-proxy InputConnection test proves SnippetInserter commits exactly phrase with cursor position 1, no trailing space, and null connection safety.

T001.notes: Unexpected Keyboard source imported; only FrankenKey app id/name/root project identity changed; namespace and source package names preserved to avoid baseline churn.

T002.notes: Local-only snippet slot JSON preserves order, phrase, custom label, icon label flag, empty slots, default visible slots, and replace semantics. Context storage writes raw phrases to no-backup storage and migrates/removes legacy PREF_SLOTS from default preferences.

T003.notes: Classic PreferenceActivity editor exposes enable toggle plus fixed visible indexed slots; each slot dialog supports phrase, optional label/icon flag, auto preview, save, clear, and add-page capacity in groups of seven.

T004.notes: SnippetRowView is an additive HorizontalScrollView sibling immediately above Keyboard2View; it builds SnippetPages.PAGE_SIZE controls per page, snaps between page-width groups, refreshes from local SnippetStore prefs, and leaves Keyboard2View unchanged.

T005.notes: Row refresh passes listener that calls _keyeventhandler.snippet_entered(slot.getPhrase()); snippet_entered delegates to send_text(phrase), preserving normal keyboard text path and exact commit behavior.

tooling_install_directive.scope: Android Studio, Android SDK, and related Android build tooling as needed

tooling_observations.adb_devices_attached: runtime emulator created and used for smoke test
tooling_observations.android_studio_app: not_installed; /Applications lookup and Spotlight bundle query returned no result

unexpected_keyboard_exact_baseline.baseline_keyboard_requirement: Copy/preserve Unexpected Keyboard exactly for bottom layout, typing behavior, gestures, modifiers, and existing settings.
unexpected_keyboard_exact_baseline.snippet_integration_requirement: Add custom snippets only as a Fleksy-style top-row add-on layer.

user_goal: Hybrid exact Unexpected Keyboard layout/function plus Fleksy-style scrollable custom hotkey extension row

R001.notes: FixedAcceptanceReview and FixedAdversarialReview both returned NO BLOCKERS after migration/removal and combined-password fixes.

V001.notes: Full unit suite passes after snippet, privacy, migration, and secure-gate fixes.

V002.notes: Snippet behavior, no-backup storage, legacy migration/removal, secure-editor hiding, no-suggestions allowance, direct-boot exclusion, settings persistence, and layout seam verified.

commands: adb -s emulator-5554 shell settings get secure default_input_method
V003.notes: Final rebuilt APK metadata is FrankenKey/debug IME; final rebuilt APK installed, enabled, selected, and dumpsys input_method showed the FrankenKey IME as current.
